rationale: Educ. Code §21.7061 governs school district waivers from educator evaluation and compensation provisions. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.7061. IMPLEMENTATION FLEXIBILITY. (a) Notwithstanding any other provision of this code and subject to Subsection (b), a school district may apply to the commissioner in writing in accordance with commissioner rule for a waiver to exempt the district or one or more district campuses from Section 21.352(a)(2)(B), 21.353, 21.354(d), 21.3541(g), 21.451, or 21.458, as specified in the waiver application.
_note: Rule concerns educator excellence innovation plan waivers; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
